channel.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief
channel.description: AI-synthesized daily intelligence brief covering AI, tech infrastructure, and the forces shaping the industry.
channel.itunes:author: Knowledge Studio
channel.itunes:summary: AI-synthesized daily intelligence brief covering AI, tech infrastructure, and the forces shaping the industry.

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — March 15, 2026
item.description:
Hey everyone, welcome back. We've got a fascinating day in the infrastructure layer today, and I want to walk you through what's actually happening beneath the surface of some pretty significant moves from Google and Anthropic. The story isn't what you might think it is on first read.
Let's start w...

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — March 14, 2026
item.description:

The biggest story today is that arXiv—this 34-year-old backbone of AI and ML research, the pl...

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — March 12, 2026

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — March 11, 2026
item.description:

The big story today is Atlassian. They're cutting 1,600 people—that's 20 percent of their ...

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — March 10, 2026
item.description:

So today we're looking at what might be the clearest signal yet that the AI economy's real winner isn't going to be the company with the best model. It's going to be the company that owns the infrastructure where AI agents actually do work together. And that's a ...

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — March 8, 2026

item.title: AI & Tech Daily Brief — March 5, 2026
item.description:

The headline is GPT-5.4, which OpenAI is shipping imminently. But here's the thing: this isn't a story about a bigger, smarter mod...
